headline: Step aside Tesla, BYD: Japanese carmakers deepen their hold on India's auto market with hybrids
summary: In the world's third-largest auto market, demand for hybrid cars is racing ahead of EVs, deepening the hold of Japanese carmakers in India.

headline: Best Buy names Jason Bonfig as new CEO, replacing Corie Barry in late October
summary: The leadership change comes as the company tries to rev up sales and capitalize on artificial intelligence-fueled innovation of laptops and mobile phones.
